commands: sudo -u ec2-user bash -lc 'D=$(ls -d /home/ec2-user/platform/data/stage3-claude 2>/dev/null || ls -d /home/ec2-user/platform/data/stage3-llama); NAME=$(basename $D); LOG=$D/stage3.log; RUN=$(ls -d $D/*/ 2>/dev/null | grep -v track-a | head -1); CASES=$(find $RUN/cases -name "*.json" 2>/dev/null | wc -l); RUNNING=$(ps -ef | grep -v grep | grep -c run-pilot3); echo === $NAME ===; echo cases=$CASES / 3744; echo running=$RUNNING active processes; LAST_CASE=$(grep "\[Pipeline\] Running test case" $LOG | tail -1 | sed -E "s/.*case: //"); echo last_case=$LAST_CASE; echo; echo === LOG DATES ===; ls -l $LOG | awk "{print \$6, \$7, \$8}"; CASE_STARTS=$(grep -c "\[Pipeline\] Running test case" $LOG); echo case_starts_in_log=$CASE_STARTS; RETRIES=$(grep -c "LLM call attempt" $LOG); echo total_retry_events=$RETRIES; echo; echo === LAST 8 LOG LINES ===; tail -8 $LOG'
